info.title: Aviationstack API
info.description: Real-time flight tracking, historical flight data, airline routes, airports, airlines, airplanes, aircraft types, cities, countries, aviation taxes and timetable data via a RESTful JSON API.

get.summary: Get real-time and historical flight data
get.description: Track flights and retrieve flight status information in real-time. Supports historical flight lookups when flight_date parameter is provided.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit of results per page. Max 100 (below Professional) or 1000 (Professional+). Default 100.

parameters.name: flight_iata
parameters.description: Filter by flight IATA code (e.g. MU2557).

parameters.name: flight_icao
parameters.description: Filter by flight ICAO code (e.g. CES2557).

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

403.description: Access restricted for current subscription plan
